trigger: loop-backlog orchestrator is running and managing a task lifecycle

context.description: The main loop-backlog orchestrator agent must never call EnterWorktree directly. Worktree entry is exclusively performed by the spawned sub-agent. The orchestrator only calls git worktree commands for setup/teardown via Bash.

required_sequence.description: Sub-agent is spawned to handle worktree work

forbidden_before_step_1.description: Main orchestrator agent must never call EnterWorktree
